task: Expose paper trading health report in Harness OS frontend

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to real entrypoints before reporting.
Code, deploy, and UI changes require real runtime verification and source-of-truth deploy flow.

changes.summary: Added Paper Trading Health card showing Alpaca/IBKR stop coverage, entry lock state, latest check time, problems, and IBKR stop orders.
Added compact operational styling for the health card with normal and warning states.

verification.name: frontend production bundle build
verification.result: TypeScript and Vite build completed; new bundle assets were generated.

verification.name: backend syntax check
verification.result: Python compile completed for backend and health report script.

verification.name: paper trading health API local entrypoint
verification.result: HTTP 200 returned expected JSON shape on local MBP; local runtime report was absent so exists=false was returned.
